song.title: Lord, You Love Me So Immensely
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [V1] . C G Am Lord You love me so immensely . Em F I would love You more intensely . C F Every day and every moment . G C O Lord capture me . G Am Let my goal and my life’s theme be . Em Lord to love You most supremely .F C With all my heart, Lord Jesus .F G C Keep me faithful unto Thee. [C] . C G Am Draw me Lord, each day . Em F Take my veils away . C F With a pure heart will I see You . G C Lord, I just love You . G Am Nothing else I seek . Em F No one else for me . C F I would fully and absolutely . G C Give my whole being unto Thee. [V2] Lord your love has overcome me Now my prayer is that I would be Ever open just to see you Lord, grow in me Make my everlasting life be In Your presence Lord, entern’ly Fill me with your life, Lord Jesus My pure enjoyment be --- [V3] Lord your love has shown me the way Lord to gain more of You each day Every time I call on You, Lord You come to me And my spirit full and gushing With your life so free and living Lord flow through all my being Be magnified in me.
